test.notes: 265 passing, 2 failing (pre-existing connectionValidator.test.ts stale expectations). 9 test files errored due to ENOSPC (low disk space) on jsdom test suites — pre-existing infrastructure issue. All 44 worldview-specific tests pass.

lint.notes: 695 errors total (694 pre-existing + 1 from worldlabs-proxy @ts-ignore). The 1 new error is documented in pending feature misc-scrutiny-fixes (milestone misc-polish-1) — will be addressed by changing @ts-ignore to @ts-expect-error.

appliedUpdates.description: Added SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN to environment.md CLI/Deployment section — required for edge function deployment but missing from environment docs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reinforce the existing 'Do not call useStore.setState() directly in components' convention. WorldviewSection.tsx has at least one direct setState call (in captureTake handler around line ~871) bypassing store actions. Consider adding a missing updateTakeImageUrl action to worldview-store.ts or noting this as a known debt.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: worldview-canvas-responsive-a11y review found setState() call in WorldviewSection.tsx. The worldview-store has updateTakeStatus but no updateTakeImageUrl action, causing the component to use setState() directly.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The worldview-worker skill's 'Write Tests First (Red Phase)' step could note an exemption for pure UI attribute/styling/polish changes (adding aria-labels, responsive Tailwind classes, onClick handlers) where unit tests don't add value.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: worldview-canvas-responsive-a11y worker feedback: 'The skill suggests writing tests first but for pure UI attribute/styling changes, writing tests doesn't add value.'

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The worldview-worker skill could add guidance for operational/deployment tasks, including: (1) Check for SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN availability before attempting deployment, (2) Document manual steps when CLI auth is unavailable, (3) Bucket creation methods (CLI, Dashboard, Management API).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: worldview-deployment worker spent time discovering CLI auth requirements and Docker limitations. Skill has no deployment section — only covers code implementation.

rejectedObservations.observation: services.yaml already includes deploy-worldlabs-proxy command — no change needed.
Feature description specified 'data: { src: imageUrl }' but actual ImageData type uses 'url'. Worker correctly used 'url'.
rejectedObservations.reason: Already handled correctly by worker. Feature description typo doesn't need a shared state update.

rejectedObservations.observation: Git repository root is /Users/gratitud3 (home directory), not the project directory.
rejectedObservations.reason: Pre-existing repo configuration issue affecting all workers. Not actionable within mission scope.
